no: Must install after EET_End and NPC EE. Reads KITLIST.2da at install time to detect all available kits.
sum: Allows dual-classing into a specific kit rather than only the base class, with optional components for specialist mage bonus slots and kit-specific proficiency enforcement.

co.n: Grant second-class Specialists their Bonus Spell Slots
Grant second-class Kits their Proper Proficiency Selection
co.tp2n: Grant second-class Specialists their Bonus Spell Slots

co.n: Grant second-class Kits their Proper Proficiency Selection
co.tp2n: Grant second-class Kits their Proper Proficiency Selection
